docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TONY WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON MARCH 4, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT TONY WONG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2013, TO GIVE THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THEIR FILINGS BY MAY 17, 2013, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT ONLY HAS THE REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT TONY CHOY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 6, 2013, TO GIVE THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT TONY K.F. WONG AND TONY CHOY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. AS TO DEFENDANT TONY K.F. WONG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES HOLDOVER TENANCY THROUGH AUGUST 2012 AND UNDERPAYMENT OF RENT IN THE AMOUNT $537,210.00 PURSUANT TO COMMERCIAL LEASE SINCE NOVEMBER 2005. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO ANSWER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES HOLDOVER TENANCY THROUGH AUGUST 2012 AND UNDERPAYMENT OF RENT IN THE AMOUNT $537,210.00 OF PURSUANT TO COMMERCIAL LEASE SINCE NOVEMBER 2005. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO ANSWER TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDERS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Hearing On Demurrers To First Amended Complaint By Defendant Tony K.F. Wong
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Roger L. Meredith of Attorney and Counselor at Law (415-616-5959) appear for plaintiff Golden Hill Enterprises LLC opposing party.
Atty. Jerome Marks of Attorney at Law (415-397-5300) appear for defendant Tony Choy moving party.
Atty. Christina Chen of Law Offices of Christina Chen (415-441-8778) appear for defendant Tony K.F. Wong moving party.
Atty. James W. Moore of James W. Moore Attorney at Law (415-431-3449) special appear for defendant Tony K.F. Wong.

Discussion, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendant Tony K.F. Wong and Tony Choy's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. As to Defendant Tony K.F. Wong's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first and second causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges holdover tenancy through August 2012 and underpayment of rent in the amount $537,210.00 pursuant to Commercial Lease since November 2005. Defendant has 30 days to answer to the first amended complaint. As to Defendant Choy's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is overruled as to the first and second causes of action. Complaint sufficiently alleges holdover tenancy through August 2012 and underpayment of rent in the amount $537,210.00 of pursuant to Commercial Lease since November 2005. Defendant has 30 days to answer to the first amended complaint. Orders signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
